message:
🐛 Show stale compliance data instantly instead of re-scanning all clusters (#2798)

Compliance hooks (Trivy, Kubescape, Kyverno, Trestle, OPA) discarded
cached data when it was older than 2 minutes (CACHE_TTL_MS) and showed
"Checking clusters... 0/8" while re-scanning all clusters from scratch.
With 11 clusters and 15-second timeouts per cluster, this took 30+
seconds on every page load.

Fix: stale-while-revalidate — always return cached data immediately,
let the auto-refresh interval (2 min) handle freshness in the
background. Cards show last-known data instantly, then update when
the live scan completes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
